title: Show Selector
description: References shows declared in an adagents.json. Buyers resolve full show objects by fetching the adagents.json at the given domain and matching show_ids against its shows array.

publisher_domain.description: Domain where the adagents.json declaring these shows is hosted (e.g., 'mrbeast.com'). The shows array in that file contains the authoritative show definitions.

show_ids.description: Show IDs from the adagents.json shows array. Each ID must match a show_id declared in that file.
